purpose: Controlled board knowledge used by Bodhi. This is not live inventory and must not be treated as availability.
rules: Manufacturer descriptions should outrank reviews once added.
Bodhi must not invent board models outside this file until SQL catalogue integration is added.
Availability must come later from ManufacturerInventory and RetailerInventory.

boards.quivrr_summary: A versatile hybrid style board for everyday surf where the surfer wants paddle power, speed and a forgiving platform.
boards.trade_offs: Not as precise as a narrow high performance shortboard in powerful surf.

boards.quivrr_summary: A fast fish influenced board for surfers wanting speed and flow in everyday waves.
boards.trade_offs: Less vertical and less precise than a performance shortboard.

boards.quivrr_summary: A small wave speed option for surfers who want glide and flow when the surf is softer.
boards.trade_offs: Not the best choice when the user wants maximum hold in steep powerful waves.

boards.quivrr_summary: A user friendly small to medium wave board for surfers who still want the board to turn.
boards.trade_offs: Not a step up or heavy water board.

boards.quivrr_summary: A hybrid option that balances speed, paddle support and turning range.
boards.trade_offs: May not feel as traditional as a PU shortboard.

boards.quivrr_summary: An everyday shortboard style recommendation when the surfer wants performance without going too unforgiving.
boards.trade_offs: Less foam forward than fuller hybrid or fish designs.
